summary: Tested Azaadi Tales MVP end-to-end. Backend: 15/15 pytest cases passed against the public preview URL — auth (signup/login/JWT), /me, stories list+detail+quiz, complete story (XP+first_story badge), quiz submit (perfect path triggers perfect_quiz badge), chat with Claude Sonnet 4.5 via emergentintegrations (chat_azaadi badge), chat history, badges/levels endpoints. Frontend mobile smoke (390x844): splash→auth→login(testkid/abcd)→home (testkid + 100 XP visible)→library (8 stories)→story reader (TTS + finish buttons present)→celebrate→quiz (5 Qs answered)→result screen — ALL working. Tab nav to Azaadi/Profile via text-locator failed due to hidden duplicate label nodes (test-script issue, not app bug — tabs visible in screenshot).

issues: RN web warns: 'shadow*' style props deprecated, use boxShadow (cosmetic only)

react_native_issues.issue: Expo doctor warns @react-native-async-storage/async-storage@3.0.2 (expected 2.2.0) and expo-speech@55.0.13 (expected ~14.0.8). Currently functional on web but may break native builds.

action_items: Optional: align expo-speech and async-storage versions with `npx expo install --fix` to silence doctor warnings.
Optional: replace shadow* props with boxShadow / use Platform.select to remove RN web deprecation warnings.
JWT_SECRET in backend/.env is 28 bytes (PyJWT InsecureKeyLengthWarning); recommend ≥32 bytes for production.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses on_event('shutdown') (deprecated FastAPI API) — consider lifespan handler, not blocking.
Quiz endpoint returns correct_answers in /quiz/submit which is good for UX feedback; ensure GET /stories/{id}/quiz never leaks answers (verified — it does NOT).
All MongoDB queries correctly project out _id.

success_rate.frontend: ~95% (auth+home+library+story+quiz verified end-to-end; chat & profile not retested in UI but backend chat verified)

seed_data_creation: Created test users TEST_<timestamp> via signup endpoint during testing. testkid account already seeded.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests at /app/backend/tests/test_azaadi_api.py are reusable regression suite. Use BASE_URL = EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL. Frontend tab navigation: prefer clicking tab buttons by role/href rather than get_by_text since the bottom tab labels render as hidden text nodes that fail Playwright visibility checks; consider adding testID to tab triggers in (tabs)/_layout.tsx (e.g., tab-home, tab-library, tab-azaadi, tab-profile).
